title: ephemerum cristatum
intro: Ephemerum cristatum, also known as the crested ephemerum, is a species of moss belonging to the family Ephemeraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ephemerum cristatum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Ephemerum cristatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
